mapper.select: SELECT fav.favorite_id, fav.created_at AS collect_time, -- 收藏时间 f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.main_image, f.price, f.tags, f.meaning, f.season, f.status AS flower_status, -- 鲜花状态 s.shop_id, c.category_name, s.shop_name, s.shop_logo, s.rating AS shop_rating, IFNULL(i.stock_quantity, 0) AS stock_quantity, IFNULL(i.sold_quantity, 0) AS sold_quantity, -- 计算字段：根据状态和库存判断是否可购买 CASE WHEN f.status = 0 THEN '已下架' WHEN IFNULL(i.stock_quantity, 0) <= 0 THEN '已售罄' ELSE '可购买' END AS purchase_status, -- 格式化收藏时间 DATE_FORMAT(fav.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS formatted_collect_time, -- 时间差，显示"XX天前收藏" TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, fav.created_at, NOW()) AS days_since_collect FROM favorites fav LEFT JOIN flowers f ON fav.flower_id = f.flower_id LEFT JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN shops s ON f.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN flowers_inventory i ON f.flower_id = i.flower_id WHERE fav.user_id = #{userId} -- 使用当前用户的ID ORDER BY fav.created_at DESC -- 按收藏时间倒序，最新的在前

SELECT fav.favorite_id, fav.created_at AS collect_time, -- 收藏时间 f.flower_id, f.flower_name, f.main_image, f.price, f.tags, f.meaning, f.season, f.status AS flower_status, -- 鲜花状态 s.shop_id, c.category_name, s.shop_name, s.shop_logo, s.rating AS shop_rating, IFNULL(i.stock_quantity, 0) AS stock_quantity, IFNULL(i.sold_quantity, 0) AS sold_quantity, -- 计算字段：根据状态和库存判断是否可购买 CASE WHEN f.status = 0 THEN '已下架' WHEN IFNULL(i.stock_quantity, 0) <= 0 THEN '已售罄' ELSE '可购买' END AS purchase_status, -- 格式化收藏时间 DATE_FORMAT(fav.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS formatted_collect_time, -- 时间差，显示"XX天前收藏" TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, fav.created_at, NOW()) AS days_since_collect FROM favorites fav LEFT JOIN flowers f ON fav.flower_id = f.flower_id LEFT JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN shops s ON f.shop_id = s.shop_id LEFT JOIN flowers_inventory i ON f.flower_id = i.flower_id WHERE fav.user_id = #{userId} AND fav.flower_id = #{flowerId} -- 使用当前用户的ID ORDER BY fav.created_at DESC -- 按收藏时间倒序，最新的在前
